title: buckety-controller.yaml
description: Outer shape of the controller config file loaded via -c <dir>. The config: block under each backend is driver-specific and strictly decoded by the driver; per-driver schemas live at pkg/drivers/<driver>/schema/<major.minor>/config.schema.json in this repo.

name.description: Consumer-facing backend name; Buckety.spec.backend selects it. Unique within the file.

driver.description: Registered driver name. The compiled-in set for this repo's binary is kadm, s3 and gcs.

config.description: Driver-specific connection config, strictly decoded by the driver (unknown keys are a startup error). See pkg/drivers/<driver>/schema/<major.minor>/config.schema.json for the per-driver shape. Fields tagged envsubst in the driver's config struct accept ${VAR} interpolation.

defaults.description: Cluster-operator-owned substitutions for ${backend.X} references in Buckety.spec.name templates (SPEC: Naming templates).

parameters.description: Cluster-operator-owned parameter defaults, merged under Buckety.spec.parameters (the CR wins per key). Lets driver-specific parameters stay out of portable CRs (SPEC: Driver families). Validated against the driver at startup.
